requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (Angola NA / IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（安哥拉NA / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（安哥拉NA / IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）

summary.en: Angola does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation. Refrigerant safety for household refrigerating appliances is handled mainly at the appliance level through the Angolan national standard (NA) adopting IEC 60335-2-24, in particular Annex AA, which sets requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants such as R-600a (isobutane, classified A3 lower flammability per ISO 817, GWP approximately 3). Requirements cover: maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration and room-volume assumptions; ventilation; avoidance of ignition sources; and clear marking and documentation of refrigerant type and charge. R-600a is well-positioned for Angola: it is the dominant hydrocarbon refrigerant in modern household refrigerators, low-GWP, and not subject to any HFC phase-down prohibition in Angola. The appliance is designed for the Angolan 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid. As a Montreal Protocol party, Angola participates in HFC phase-down obligations at the national/treaty level, but this does not impose an EU-F-Gas-style product prohibition schedule on R-600a appliances.
summary.zh: 安哥拉不实行欧盟式氟气体削减法规。家用制冷器具的制冷剂安全主要在器具层面通过采纳IEC 60335-2-24的安哥拉国家标准（NA）处理，特别是附件AA，其规定了使用R-600a（异丁烷，按ISO 817归类为A3低可燃性，GWP约3）等可燃制冷剂器具的要求。要求涵盖：每种隔间配置及房间容积假设下的R-600a最大充注量；通风；避免点火源；及制冷剂类型与充注量的清晰标识和文件。R-600a对安哥拉具备良好条件：它是现代家用电冰箱主流的碳氢化合物制冷剂，低GWP，且在安哥拉不受任何HFC削减禁令约束。器具按安哥拉220 V/50 Hz单相电网设计。作为蒙特利尔议定书缔约方，安哥拉在国家/条约层面参与HFC削减义务，但这并不对R-600a器具施加欧盟氟气体式产品禁令时间表。
summary.zht: 安哥拉不實行歐盟式氟氣體削減法規。家用製冷器具的制冷劑安全主要在器具層面通過採納IEC 60335-2-24的安哥拉國家標準（NA）處理，特別是附件AA，其規定了使用R-600a（異丁烷，按ISO 817歸類為A3低可燃性，GWP約3）等可燃製冷劑器具的要求。要求涵蓋：每種隔間配置及房間容積假設下的R-600a最大充注量；通風；避免點火源；及制冷劑類型與充注量的清晰標識和文件。R-600a對安哥拉具備良好條件：它是現代家用電冰箱主流的碳氫化合物制冷劑，低GWP，且在安哥拉不受任何HFC削減禁令約束。器具按安哥拉220 V/50 Hz單相電網設計。作為蒙特利爾議定書締約方，安哥拉在國家/條約層面參與HFC削減義務，但這並不對R-600a器具施加歐盟氟氣體式產品禁令時間表。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements) — basis adopted into Angolan national standards NA
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment — Angola HFC phase-down participation at treaty level (no EU-F-Gas-style product prohibition schedule for R-600a appliances)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household refrigerating appliances at appliance level through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source controls), read with GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE), separately from any EU F-Gas-style schedule. Because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 and Angolan NA flammable-refrigerant provisions derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the engineering basis for R-600a charge and safety is closely aligned — a Chinese refrigerator built with compliant R-600a charge is technically well-matched to Angolan expectations.
summary.zh: 中国在器具层面通过GB 4706.13-2014处理家用制冷器具的可燃制冷剂安全，其纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风、点火源控制），须与GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）结合使用。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理，与任何欧盟氟气体式时间表分开。由于中国GB 4706.13与安哥拉NA的可燃制冷剂规定均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量及安全的工程基础高度一致——以合规R-600a充注量制造的中国电冰箱在技术上与安哥拉期望高度匹配。
summary.zht: 中國在器具層面通過GB 4706.13-2014處理家用製冷器具的可燃制冷劑安全，其納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風、點火源控制），須與GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）結合使用。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理，與任何歐盟氟氣體式時間表分開。由於中國GB 4706.13與安哥拉NA的可燃制冷劑規定均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量及安全的工程基礎高度一致——以合規R-600a充注量製造的中國電冰箱在技術上與安哥拉期望高度匹配。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is minimal and chiefly documentary, because Angola has no EU-style F-Gas phase-down and both Chinese and Angolan flammable-refrigerant rules derive from IEC 60335-2-24: (1) Documentation — product information presented at Angolan import inspection (in Portuguese) should explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), the charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety notices per the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis; (2) Charge verification — the R-600a charge should be confirmed against the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits; since the Chinese GB 4706.13 basis is the same IEC text, an existing compliant charge typically transfers, but the importer/IANORQ may want the charge value evidenced in the conformity file; (3) No HFC phase-down filing — unlike an EU route, there is no F-Gas-style prohibition schedule to assess for R-600a in Angola, so no equivalent of an EU Reg. 2024/573 Annex IV check is needed. If any model in the range still uses an HFC (e.g., R-134a), that is a commercial/technology consideration but not an Angola-specific phase-down prohibition; confirm there is no general import restriction with IANORQ and the importer.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距很小且主要属文件性，因为安哥拉无欧盟式氟气体削减，且中安两国可燃制冷剂规则均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）文件——在安哥拉进口查验时提交的产品信息（葡萄牙语）应明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、以克计的充注量及依据IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂安全提示；（2）充注量核实——R-600a充注量应对照IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值确认；由于中国GB 4706.13基础为同一IEC文本，既有合规充注量通常可转移，但进口商/IANORQ可能希望在符合性档案中提供充注量证据；（3）无HFC削减申报——与欧盟路径不同，安哥拉对R-600a无氟气体式禁令时间表需评估，故无需进行等同欧盟法规2024/573附件IV的核查。若产品系列中仍有型号使用HFC（如R-134a），属商业/技术考量，但并非安哥拉专属削减禁令；请向IANORQ及进口商确认无一般进口限制。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距很小且主要屬文件性，因為安哥拉無歐盟式氟氣體削減，且中安兩國可燃制冷劑規則均源自IEC 60335-2-24：（1）文件——在安哥拉進口查驗時提交的產品資訊（葡萄牙語）應明確說明制冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、以克計的充注量及依據IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷劑安全提示；（2）充注量核實——R-600a充注量應對照IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值確認；由於中國GB 4706.13基礎為同一IEC文本，既有合規充注量通常可轉移，但進口商/IANORQ可能希望在符合性檔案中提供充注量證據；（3）無HFC削減申報——與歐盟路徑不同，安哥拉對R-600a無氟氣體式禁令時間表需評估，故無需進行等同歐盟法規2024/573附件IV的核查。若產品系列中仍有型號使用HFC（如R-134a），屬商業/技術考量，但並非安哥拉專屬削減禁令；請向IANORQ及進口商確認無一般進口限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via NA adopting IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, marking); NO EU-F-Gas-style product phase-down schedule applies in Angola for R-600a appliances
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate from any EU F-Gas schedule

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis adopted by IANORQ; ISO 817 refrigerant classification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Angola: it is the dominant low-GWP refrigerant and faces no EU-F-Gas-style phase-down there. Because both the Chinese GB 4706.13 and Angolan NA flammable-refrigerant rules derive from IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, a compliant Chinese R-600a charge transfers technically. The practical step is documentary — state the refrigerant (R-600a / isobutane) and charge in grams with safety notices in Portuguese, and have the charge value available in the import-inspection file. Verify there is no general import restriction with IANORQ and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a对安哥拉具备良好条件：它是主流低GWP制冷剂，在当地不面临欧盟氟气体式削减。由于中国GB 4706.13与安哥拉NA的可燃制冷剂规则均源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，合规的中国R-600a充注量在技术上可转移。实际步骤属文件性——以葡萄牙语说明制冷剂（R-600a/异丁烷）及以克计的充注量并附安全提示，并在进口查验档案中备妥充注量数值。请向IANORQ及进口商确认无一般进口限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a對安哥拉具備良好條件：它是主流低GWP制冷劑，在當地不面臨歐盟氟氣體式削減。由於中國GB 4706.13與安哥拉NA的可燃制冷劑規則均源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，合規的中國R-600a充注量在技術上可轉移。實際步驟屬文件性——以葡萄牙語說明制冷劑（R-600a/異丁烷）及以克計的充注量並附安全提示，並在進口查驗檔案中備妥充注量數值。請向IANORQ及進口商確認無一般進口限制。
